text:

I’ll inspect the PagerDuty incidents table schema to confirm the id column, then retrieve the triggered high-urgency incidents and their IDs along with the count.

tool_calls.name: execute_sql
tool_calls.input: {"sql":"SELECT column_name, data_type FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_name = 'pagerduty_incidents' ORDER BY ordinal_position;"}

tool_calls.name: execute_sql
tool_calls.input: {"sql":"SELECT id FROM pagerduty_incidents WHERE status = 'triggered' AND urgency = 'high';"}
